tasks.title: Design Token Fidelity Validation Against Stitch References
tasks.description:
Visually compare every restyled page against the corresponding design reference in docs/design/stitch/. For each reference (admin_dashboard_posts_uber_style, database_backups_monolith, logs_activity_monolith, monolith_grid, settings_config_monolith, users_auth_monolith), open the implemented page side-by-side with the reference screenshot/HTML and verify:
- Color values match the DESIGN.md spec (#000000 primary, #FFFFFF surface, #5e5e5e secondary, #777777 outline, #F3F3F4/#EEEEEE/#DADADA surface hierarchy, #ba1a1a error)
- Typography scale matches: Display-LG 3.5rem/800, Headline-LG 2rem/700, Title-MD 1.125rem/600, Body-LG 1rem/400, Label-MD 0.75rem/700/uppercase/+0.05em tracking
- Inter font loads for all UI text, JetBrains Mono loads for all technical data (IDs, timestamps, code blocks, URLs)
- Material Symbols Outlined icons render correctly at 20px
- Spacing follows the scale: micro 0.35-0.7rem, standard 1.4rem, macro 4-7rem
- Zero border-radius is enforced everywhere (inspect computed styles, no value > 0px except border-radius: 9999px for full circles)
- No box-shadows exist anywhere (inspect computed styles)
- All borders are exactly 1px solid black (light mode) or 1px solid white (dark mode)

tasks.title: Dark Mode Inversion Correctness Across All Pages
tasks.description:
Toggle dark mode on every page in the application and verify the binary inversion system works correctly. For each page (Login, Overview, Collections, CollectionEditor, RecordsBrowser, Logs, Backups, Settings, AuthProviders, ApiDocs, Webhooks):
1. Verify background switches from #FFFFFF to #000000
2. Verify all text switches from black to white
3. Verify all borders switch from 1px solid black to 1px solid white
4. Verify primary buttons invert: white bg + black text in dark mode
5. Verify active sidebar item inverts: white bg + black text in dark mode
6. Verify table headers invert: white bg + black text in dark mode
7. Check that no element becomes invisible (same color text on same color background)
8. Check that status badges (success green, error red) remain readable in dark mode
9. Verify the ThemeToggle dropdown itself renders correctly in dark mode
10. Verify custom scrollbar colors invert appropriately
11. Test the system theme preference option follows OS setting

tasks.title: Responsive Layout Breakpoint Testing
tasks.description:
Test all restyled pages at key responsive breakpoints to ensure the layout adapts correctly without breaking the monolith design language. Test at: 375px (iPhone SE), 390px (iPhone 14), 768px (tablet), 1024px (small desktop), 1440px (standard desktop), 1920px (large desktop). For each breakpoint verify:
1. Sidebar collapses to hamburger menu on mobile (<768px) and the mobile drawer slides from left with 1px black border
2. Header remains functional and readable at all widths
3. 12-column grid layouts (Overview, Settings, CollectionEditor) properly collapse to single-column on mobile
4. Tables on Collections, Records, Logs, Backups pages are scrollable horizontally on mobile or properly collapse
5. Form layouts (Settings 4/8 split, CollectionEditor numbered sections) stack vertically on mobile
6. Modals (RecordFormModal, delete confirmations) are properly sized and not clipped on mobile
7. No horizontal overflow/scrollbar appears unintentionally
8. Touch targets on mobile are at least 44x44px for accessibility
9. The FileUpload drop zone is usable on mobile
10. Pagination controls are accessible on small screens

tasks.title: WCAG AA Accessibility Compliance After Redesign
tasks.description:
Verify that the black/white binary design system meets WCAG AA accessibility standards. The monolith design's stark contrast approach could create issues with certain color combinations. Specific checks:
1. Run axe or Lighthouse accessibility audit on every page
2. Verify all text meets 4.5:1 contrast ratio minimum (body text) and 3:1 for large text - pay special attention to #777777 and #5e5e5e text on white backgrounds as these may fail
3. Verify all focus indicators are visible - the 2px black border focus state must be distinguishable from the 1px default border
4. Verify skip-to-main-content link still works in DashboardLayout
5. Verify all form inputs have associated labels (the uppercase Label-MD labels must be properly linked via for/id or aria-labelledby)
6. Verify keyboard navigation works through sidebar nav items, form fields, table rows, modals, and dropdowns
7. Verify the ThemeToggle dropdown is keyboard accessible (arrow keys, Enter, Escape)
8. Verify modal focus trapping works in RecordFormModal and delete confirmation dialogs
9. Verify status badges convey meaning beyond color alone (screen reader text for success/error states)
10. Verify ARIA attributes are preserved on all interactive elements after restyling

tasks.title: Functional Regression Testing of All CRUD Operations Post-Restyle
tasks.description:
Verify that all data operations continue to function correctly after the visual redesign, since form inputs, buttons, modals, and tables have all been restyled. Test each workflow end-to-end:
1. Collections: Create a new collection, edit its schema (add/remove fields of each type), delete a collection - verify confirmation dialog works
2. Records: Create a record with all field types (text, number, bool, email, url, date, select, multiSelect, file, relation, json, editor), edit it, delete it. Verify file upload works in the restyled FileUpload zone. Verify RelationPicker dropdown search and selection works
3. Backups: Trigger a backup creation, verify it appears in the table, download a backup, delete a backup with confirmation
4. Settings: Modify and save SMTP settings, Meta settings, S3 storage settings - verify save button triggers API call and shows success toast
5. Auth Providers: Enable/disable an auth provider toggle, configure OAuth2 settings, save changes
6. Webhooks: Create a webhook with event selection, edit URL, toggle active/inactive, delete with confirmation
7. Login: Submit login form with valid credentials, verify error display with invalid credentials, verify form validation messages appear correctly in the restyled error format
8. Logs: Verify log data loads, filter by status using restyled toggle buttons, verify pagination works
9. Toast notifications: Trigger success and error toasts, verify they appear/dismiss correctly with the new instant (no-animation) styling

summary: Five project-specific QA tasks targeting the unique risks of the UI style redesign: (1) pixel-level design token fidelity against stitch references, (2) dark mode binary inversion correctness across all pages, (3) responsive layout integrity at all breakpoints, (4) WCAG AA accessibility compliance given the stark black/white design, and (5) functional regression of all CRUD operations after restyling forms, tables, modals, and buttons.
